title: The Merchant's Plea
objective: Defeat 3 skeletons to escort the merchant

dialogue.start: Please — my guard took an arrow to the shoulder.
dialogue.mid_combat: They're coming from the north! Watch your flank!
dialogue.objective_complete: I owe you my life. Take this — it's sharp.

dialogue.speaker: JIN
dialogue.text: Keep your coin. The dead don't need it. But stay behind me.
